title: bidens wichmanii
intro: Bidens wichmanii, also known as the sticky beggarticks or sticky beggar lice, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Bidens wichmanii has been used in folk medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help in treating various health issues. The plant's leaves and stems contain compounds that may provide relief from pain, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Bidens wichmanii can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are often used to treat skin conditions, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
